turns.text: Hello! Thank you for calling DigeeSell. I'm Digee, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?
I'm going to ask you a question.
Sure, go ahead! What would you like to ask?
What are the services of SCO?

SEO, or Search Engine Optimization, includes services like keyword research, on-page and technical SEO, content creation, and link building to improve your website's visibility on search engines. Is there anything else I can help you with?
And what are the prices of SCO?
I can have one of our specialists call you back with exact pricing details — would that work for you?
You're welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with?
Okay, so you don't have any information about what the product of SEO services?
I can connect you with a specialist who can provide detailed information about our SEO services and offerings. Would you like that?
Sure! If you have any other questions or need assistance, feel free to ask.
Let me connect me to a derivative.
It seems like you might be looking for a specific service or team member. Could you clarify what you mean by "derivative"? I'm here to help!
